title: Shoot Loud, Louder... I Don't Understand
writer: Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Eduardo De Filippo
actors: Marcello Mastroianni, Raquel Welch, Guido Alberti
plot: Stuck in a dream world of his own, Italian sculptor Albert Saporito (Marcello Mastroianni) sometimes has difficulty separating truth from fiction. When he dreams that his gangster neighbor has been murdered, he reports the crime t...
